tweets.text: Google Quantum AI says fewer than 500K physical qubits crack secp256k1 in 9 minutes. Bitcoin's block time? 10 minutes. The window between "transaction broadcast" and "key stolen" is now thinner than a single block confirmation.

EUROCRYPT 2026 paper just slashed the qubits needed to break P-256 by 44% — down to 1,193 logical qubits. Bitcoin's secp256k1 shares that 256-bit curve structure. The quantum timeline for elliptic curve crypto is compressing fast.

One independent researcher, cloud quantum hardware, 15-bit ECDSA broken — a 512x efficiency gain since late 2025. You don't need a national lab anymore. The democratization of quantum key-cracking should concern everyone in crypto.

IBM's dynamic compass code cut quantum logical error rates 38.3% at distance-5 on real superconducting hardware — not simulation, actual qubits. The error correction threshold that was "years away" just landed on production topology.
